direct_connection_description: {{browserName}} supports direct USB scanner connection. Just plug in your scanner and click connect.
step_connect_scanner_usb: Connect your barcode scanner via USB
step_select_scanner_popup: Select your scanner from the browser popup
scanner_ready_description: Your scanner is connected and ready. You can close this dialog and start scanning.
scanner_not_connected_description: Bridge is running but no scanner detected. Please select a scanner port from the system tray menu.
bridge_app_required_description: {{browserName}} doesn't support direct USB access. Download our free bridge app to connect your scanner.
step_download_install_bridge: Download and install Care Scanner Bridge
step_launch_app: Launch the app (runs in system tray)
step_select_scanner_port: Select your scanner port from the tray menu
